user_features.skin_tone: Light to light-medium skin tone with a neutral-to-warm overall palette context.
user_features.hairstyle: Short wavy bob with bangs, dark burgundy-brown tone.
user_features.body_type_characteristics: Slim-to-average build with a relatively straight silhouette; shoulders and hips appear fairly balanced, with a lightly defined waist enhanced by the high-waisted skirt.

current_outfit.style: Minimal, feminine, casual-chic summer styling with a soft monochrome base and modern contrast accessories.
current_outfit.color: Predominantly white/cream with black accents from the shoulder bag and shoes.
current_outfit.material: Lightweight ribbed or knit sleeveless top paired with a sheer, textured, layered skirt; leather or faux-leather bag and glossy black-and-white shoes.

advantages: The monochrome white palette creates a clean, airy vertical line that visually elongates the frame.
The fitted sleeveless top balances well with the softer, flowing skirt, giving the outfit a polished feminine silhouette.
areas_for_improvement: The waistband and skirt volume could be slightly more defined to emphasize the waist and avoid the lower half looking too loose.
The black shoulder bag and shoes add contrast, but coordinating one more dark accessory or choosing softer-toned footwear could make the look feel more cohesive.
